name: Geraint
description: Geraint, son of Erbin, is a prominent knight featured in Arthurian legends, particularly in Welsh and French romances. He is often depicted as a noble and valiant warrior, known for his strength, chivalry, and unwavering loyalty to King Arthur. Geraint's story frequently revolves around themes of love, honor, and proving one's worth. He is a complex character, sometimes portrayed as overly proud or jealous, but ultimately redeemed by his courageous actions and devotion to his wife, Enid. His adventures often involve quests to defend the innocent, defeat formidable adversaries, and uphold the ideals of the Round Table. Geraint's tale highlights the importance of trust and communication within relationships, as well as the challenges faced by knights in maintaining their honor and reputation. He embodies the chivalric code, demonstrating bravery, courtesy, and respect for women. Geraint's legacy is one of a skilled knight who overcomes personal flaws to become a true hero, leaving a lasting impact on Arthurian lore and inspiring generations with his tales of valor and romance. His narrative explores the intricacies of courtly love and the duties of a knight in a world of magic and adventure, making him a compelling figure in the rich tapestry of Arthurian mythology. He is a symbol of the ideal knight, striving for perfection and ultimately finding redemption through love and service.
subtitle: Valiant Knight of Arthur's Court
achievements: Defeated the Knight of the Sparrowhawk
Won the tournament for Enid's hand
Served King Arthur with loyalty and courage

keyMyths.title: The Sparrowhawk Tournament
keyMyths.description: Geraint participates in a tournament where the prize is a sparrowhawk. He defeats the arrogant knight holding the hawk, winning it for Enid and proving his worth.

keyMyths.title: Geraint and Enid
keyMyths.description: Geraint marries Enid but becomes overly suspicious of her loyalty. Through a series of trials and adventures, Enid proves her faithfulness and Geraint learns to trust her.

keyMyths.title: The Adventure with the Giants
keyMyths.description: Geraint encounters giants terrorizing a local population and, with his strength and courage, defeats them, restoring peace and earning the gratitude of the people.

sources.author: Anonymous
sources.description: A collection of early Welsh tales, including the tale of Geraint son of Erbin.
sources.text: A collection of early Welsh tales, including the tale of Geraint son of Erbin.

sources.author: Chrétien de Troyes
sources.description: A French romance featuring a similar story to Geraint and Enid.
sources.text: A French romance featuring a similar story to Geraint and Enid.
